title: Energizing Indonesia’s rise as an AI contender - Tech - The Jakarta Post
body: 1 day ago - These align with the nation’s development goals and digital transformation priorities, as set out in Indonesia’s RPJPN 2025-2045, RPJMN 2025-2029 and the Asta Cita. With the delivery of momentum being critical, eight ‘Quick Win’ use cases have been determined to drive innovation across several priority sectors over the next few years. Achieving these AI aspirations, however, may require a few key challenges to be addressed first, such as the nation’s uneven digital infrastructure.

title: The rise of AI in Indonesia is expanding financial inclusion | World Economic Forum
body: February 17, 2025 - Indonesia has experienced significant digital growth with increasing internet penetration and financial inclusion. AI enhances financial inclusion by improving fraud detection, risk assessment and personalized customer experiences.

title: AI adoption is boosting productivity, particularly among Indonesia’s Gen Z, yet skill gaps across generations remain a challenge
body: February 23, 2026 - In Indonesia, daily GenAI users report significantly greater benefits than infrequent users – 96% vs 75% for productivity, 82% vs 63% for job security, and 72% vs 52% for salary gains · AI adoption remains uneven, with only 14% of global ...

title: Menilik Masa Depan AI di Indonesia 2025 - Infra Security
body: August 24, 2025 - Indonesia terus melangkah maju dalam membangun fondasi AI, baik dari sisi infrastruktur digital, kebijakan pemerintah, hingga peningkatan kualitas sumber daya manusia (SDM). Salah satu tonggak utama adalah investasi Microsoft sebesar USD 1,7 miliar yang diumumkan pada tahun 2024, mencakup pembangunan Indonesia Central Region, yakni pusat data Azure pertama di Indonesia. Cloud region ini dijadwalkan beroperasi pada kuartal kedua tahun 2025 dan diproyeksikan mampu mendukung kebutuhan komputasi AI tingkat tinggi serta mendorong transformasi digital sektor publik dan swasta.
